response: This code performs **standard matrix multiplication** between two matrices `A` (size *m×n*) and `B` (size *n×p*), producing a result matrix (size *m×p*). It uses a **triple-nested loop** to compute each element of the result as the **dot product** of the corresponding row from `A` and column from `B**, adhering to the definition of matrix multiplication with a time complexity of *O(m·n·p)*.
